{{Quote|Mr. Tralkpha, turn us around, if you please.|Mara Jade to Tralkpha|<ref name="aac">''[[Ambush at Corellia]]''</ref>}}
'''Tralkpha''' was the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] navigator of the ship ''[[Jade's Fire]]''.<ref name="CSWE" /> He was described as taciturn. After the resolution of the [[Corellian Crisis|First Corellian Insurrection]], [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] surmised that he was most probably dead, but hoped there was a chance he had only been captured or had hidden on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]].
